creator: knu@idaemons.org
text:
Hi,

I modified these ports as attached.  Please check if they are okay.

I did pretty big changes, so ask me anything you don't understand.
(Private mails in Japaense are welcome, if complicated)


Incidentally, please do a portlint before submitting a port.  I had to
get rid of some trivial lints that can easily found by portlint.

-- 
                           /
                          /__  __       
                         / )  )  ) )  /
Akinori -Aki- MUSHA aka / (_ /  ( (__(  @ idaemons.org / FreeBSD.org

"We're only at home when we're on the run, on the wing, on the fly"
